text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I can just picture my sisters'
smiling faces!
choice_data_list: I wanted to get one for you, too, though...
I wanted to get one for you, too, though...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You were thinking of me as well?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well, the thought alone is plenty for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'd better ship these off to my sisters! Don't
worry, I'll tell them you were the one who won
them!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure they'll want to thank you, so have
a little chat with them when they do! Thanks!
